overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a nighttime walk through the historic city of Saint Denis. The player moves from covered sidewalks onto muddy streets, passing horse-drawn carriages and an electric tram, before entering a covered market area with a butcher stall and finally a barrel storage warehouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden sidewalk transitioning to muddy street

events.description: steps out from covered walkway into the open muddy street
horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right across the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk then stepping out into the muddy street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: wooden sidewalk with roof support posts and hanging lantern
two-story wooden frontier-style buildings with lit windows
green tarpaulin covering market stalls along the building front

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden sidewalk with a hanging lantern, then transitions onto a muddy cobblestone street. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left, moving through the historic frontier town at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy city street with tram tracks

events.description: electric tram passes by on the right side of the street
turns left to follow the street alongside the market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy street parallel to tram tracks

notable_agents.action: Saint Denis electric tram moving along tracks on the right side

entered.detail: wooden plank barriers lining the edge of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open muddy street with tram tracks, an electric tram passes on the right. The camera turns left, passing wooden barricades while approaching the green canvas awnings of the market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market area with covered stalls

events.description: enters the covered market area with green canvas awnings

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the market stall area with wooden crates and barriers

entered.detail: stacked wooden boxes and crates along the market stalls
wooden market structures with green canvas coverings
vertical wooden support posts for the awnings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered market area with green canvas awnings overhead. Wooden crates and support posts line the path as the camera moves deeper into the market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: butcher market stall with meat displays

events.description: approaches the butcher counter with displayed meat and carcasses
exits the market stall back toward the street

agents.ego_description: examining the butcher stall with meat displays and hanging carcasses

notable_agents.action: butcher standing behind the counter preparing meat

entered.detail: wooden counter with glass display cases containing meat cuts
raw meat cuts arranged on the counter and in metal trays
animal carcasses hanging from hooks behind the counter
wooden shelves with boxes and supplies

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered market, the camera approaches a butcher stall with meat displays in glass cases and carcasses hanging in the background. A butcher stands behind the counter before the camera turns to exit back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy street in light rain passing market building

events.description: light rain begins to fall, visible in the street lamp light

agents.ego_description: walking past the market building exterior in the rain

entered.detail: exterior view of the market building with green awnings and wooden facade

segments.scene_description: Briefly back outside, the camera walks past the market building exterior as light rain begins to fall, visible in the glow of the street lamps. The muddy street reflects the warm lamplight.

scene_state.functional_zone: barrel storage warehouse with arched corridors

events.description: enters the arched warehouse storage area with stacked barrels

agents.ego_description: walking through the arched corridor between stacks of wooden barrels

entered.detail: stone archways leading into dimly lit storage rooms
large wooden barrels stacked in the storage corridor
burlap sacks piled on wooden platforms

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrow enclosed warehouse with stone arched doorways and corridors lined with stacked wooden barrels and burlap sacks. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, creating a sense of moving deep into the storage facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the illuminated sidewalks of a historic frontier town into the dim, enclosed depths of a storage warehouse. It begins under a covered wooden sidewalk lit by a hanging lantern before stepping out onto a muddy cobblestone street where a horse-drawn carriage and an electric tram pass by. As the camera turns left past wooden barricades, the open street gives way to a semi-covered market characterized by green canvas awnings, wooden crates, and a butcher stall with hanging carcasses. The scene then shifts briefly back outdoors into a light rain that makes the muddy ground reflect the warm glow of street lamps before turning toward a stone arched doorway. Finally, the camera moves deep into a narrow warehouse, transitioning from the rainy night into a dim, atmospheric corridor lined with stacked wooden barrels and burlap sacks.
